creator: ziaee@FreeBSD.org
text: The cgit links are actually something people who are successful here love about freebsd. Freebsd has minimal abstractions compared to other operating systems, so it's easier to figure out what's going on and work with the system. The bread and butter of the lasting and contributing community is people that rely on this type of design. I hope the new application portal will be simple like cgit and not create excessive complexity by trying to make abstractions for user friendliness. Freebsd is the best stick shift on the market. It's a lot better for the ecosystem to just teach people how to drive.
